title: tabernaemontana debrayi
intro: Tabernaemontana debrayi, also known as the Devil's Claw or Yellow Milkwood, is a woody plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana debrayi include alleviating symptoms of arthritis, fibromyalgia, and other musculoskeletal disorders, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of this plant include dried root extracts and infusions, which can be taken in various forms, such as teas, capsules, or tinctures, although caution should be exercised when consuming this plant due to potential side effects.
